name: example-clone-open-design
title: Clone Open Design
description: Clone the Open Design site — the self-evolving enterprise design-system landing.

description_i18n.en: Clone the Open Design site — the self-evolving enterprise design-system landing.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 复刻 Open Design 官网 —— 企业自进化设计系统落地页。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 復刻 Open Design 官網 —— 企業自進化設計系統落地頁。

query.en: Clone this website faithfully: https://open-design.ai. Use the web-clone workflow — recon the site, harvest its real fonts and images, match its exact colors and scroll feel, then build a local clone. Keep the original assets; record trademarks/copyright in NOTES.md for me to replace.
query.zh-CN: 忠实复刻这个网站：https://open-design.ai。走 web-clone 流程 —— 侦察站点、抓取真实字体与图片、照抄精确色值与滚动体感，再构建本地复刻。保留原始素材；把商标/版权项记进 NOTES.md 交我替换。
